sections.paragraph:
ἔδεσμα, ατος, τό (on the old epic pres. ἔδω s. LfgrE s.v.; Pla. et al.; ViHab 5 [Sch. 86, 7]; Jos., Ant. 1, 43) food in our lit. only pl. (as Batr. 31; X., Hiero 1, 23; OGI 665, 59; LXX; TestJob 13:4; Test12Patr) Hv 3, 9, 3a; m 5, 2, 2; 6, 2, 5; 8:3; 12, 2, 1; Hs 5, 2, 9ff; 5, 3, 7; 5, 5, 3. μὴ ἔχειν ἐδέσματα have nothing to eat v 3, 9, 3b.—DELG s.v. ἔδω.

pres. pres. = present

LfgrE LfgrE = Lexicon des frühgriechischen Epos—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

ViHab ViHab , s. ViIs

Sch. Sch. = TSchermann, Prophetarum vitae fabulosae—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

  1. pl. = plural

Batr Batr , prob. not before I a.d.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

TestJob TestJob = Testament of Job—List 2

Test12Patr Test12Patr = Testaments of the Twelve Patriarchs, with interpolations II b.c.–III a.d.—List 2

Hv Hv = Visions

m m = Mandates

Hs Hs = Similitudes

v v = Visions

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 275
